title: Create transcript_chunks table, RLS, and Realtime replication
description: Create a new `transcript_chunks` database table in Supabase, enable row-level security (RLS) to restrict access to authenticated owners, and configure Supabase Realtime subscription replication.
acceptanceCriteria: `public.transcript_chunks` table exists with columns: id, meeting_id, chunk_index, start_time, end_time, text, status, and created_at.
Row-Level Security (RLS) is enabled on the table.
A SELECT policy allows authenticated users to only read chunks associated with their own meetings.
An INSERT policy allows inserting chunks.
Supabase Realtime is enabled on the table.

steps.details: Create `supabase/migrations/20260620_transcript_chunks.sql` with CREATE TABLE, ALTER TABLE ENABLE RLS, and CREATE POLICY statements.

steps.description: Enable Supabase Realtime on the table
steps.details: Add SQL in the migration file to publish updates to the supabase_realtime publication: `alter publication supabase_realtime add table public.transcript_chunks;`
Execute the SQL statements on the Supabase database using the Supabase MCP client tool or via local CLI query commands.

technicalNotes: Verify RLS policies using SELECT queries to ensure other users cannot see transcript chunks belonging to a different user's meeting.
